accessLimitedJoinWaitlistGetYourSpot: Access is limited to invited users. Join the waitlist and follow Nado on X to get your spot.
activateOneClickTradingDepositDescriptio: To activate 1-Click Trading, you must first deposit a minimum of <highlight>$5.00</highlight> into your account.

step2.description: Your account will not be created until you fund it.
step2.heading: Fund Account

approvalForSymbolRequired: Approval for {{symbol}} is required. You will need to deposit after the approval transaction is confirmed.
approveSuccessInfo: You can now deposit the asset. The modal should automatically update.
borrowRiskWarningDescription: You can borrow assets against your existing collateral. Borrowing increases your margin usage and account risk.
bridgeUsdcApprovalInfo: You may be prompted to sign an approval transaction before the deposit transaction.
bridgeUsdcNativeDescription: Bridge USDC natively via Circle CCTP
cancelOrdersOnDisable1ctWarning: Any existing limit and TP/SL orders will be cancelled when disabling 1CT.
changeOneClickTradingPreferencesInSettin: You can change your 1CT preferences in Settings.
closeAllPositionsDescription: Are you sure you want to close all of your{{sideContent}} positions at market price?
closePositionSummary_loss: You will close <highlight>{{amount}} {{productName}}</highlight> with an estimated loss of <signdependentcolor>{{realizedPnL}}</signdependentcolor>
closePositionSummary_profit: You will close <highlight>{{amount}} {{productName}}</highlight> with an estimated profit of <signdependentcolor>{{realizedPnL}}</signdependentcolor>
confirmCloseAllPositionsAtMarketPrice: Are you sure you want to close all of your positions at market price?
confirmCloseAllPositionsAtMarketPrice_lo: Are you sure you want to close all of your long positions at market price?
confirmCloseAllPositionsAtMarketPrice_sh: Are you sure you want to close all of your short positions at market price?

connectCustomWalletDialog.customAddressHelpText: View the app as a different address. Leave blank to use the address associated with the signing key.
connectCustomWalletDialog.signingKeyHelpText: The private key for signing transactions. Leave blank to autogenerate.

convertRepayDescription: Convert is a feature that lets you easily sell (convert) a positive balance to repay borrowed assets. This feature is only supported for markets with {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}} as the quote currency.
cookiesNotice: Nado may collect and disclose data using cookies and other data collection technologies (“Cookies”) to third-party partners, including service providers. This data may include basic identification information, device information, and other unique identifiers related to your activity on our website and applications, such as your location, pages visited, custom events, certain interactions with trading features, and commercial data. You may accept or reject all Cookies by clicking on the “Accept All” or “Reject All” buttons when prompted. You can also withdraw your consent to Cookies at any time by changing your preferences. In addition, you may block or delete Cookies directly through your browser settings by following the instructions provided by your browser. Visit our <action>Cookie Policy</action> to learn more.

24hVolume.content: Total value of all trades in this market over the past 24 hours, denominated in the quote {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}}.
24hVolume.title: 24h Volume

accountLeverage.content: The multiplier of how much margin you're using against the value of your assets.
accountLeverage.title: Account Leverage

assetBalance.content: Net balance for this asset. Positive indicates a deposit and negative indicates a borrow. Unsettled {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}} is not included.
assetBalance.title: Asset Balance

availableMarginUsd.content: The margin you have available to open new positions or increase existing ones. It is derived from your account's equity and existing initial margin requirements.
availableMarginUsd.title: Available Margin (Initial Margin / Free Collateral)

averageEntryPrice.content: The weighted average price at which the position was entered.
averageEntryPrice.title: Entry Price

borrowAPY.content: The current estimated APY you pay for borrowing this asset. Interest on negative balances is accrued continuously and charged automatically, with payments processed roughly every 15 minutes.
borrowAPY.title: Borrow APY

countdownToNextFunding.content: Funding payments are made every hour.
countdownToNextFunding.title: Countdown

availableMargin.description: The margin you have available to open new positions or increase existing ones. It is derived from your account's equity and existing initial margin requirements.
availableMargin.subtitle: (Initial Margin / Free Collateral)
availableMargin.title: Available Margin

feeTier.description: Your current tier's fee percentage for maker / taker orders. Fee tiers are updated approximately every 24hr.
feeTier.makerFee: Maker fee: earned or rebated when you add liquidity (limit orders).
feeTier.takerFee: Taker fee: charged when you remove liquidity (market orders).
feeTier.title: Fee Tier

funding1h.description: The predicted 1h funding rate for this market.
funding1h.details: Funding fees are exchanged between holders of long and short positions every hour to keep the price of perpetual futures contracts aligned with the market price of the underlying asset.
funding1h.formula: Funding Fees = Position Value × Funding Rate.
funding1h.negative: Negative Funding Rate: Short position holders pay long position holders.
funding1h.positive: Positive Funding Rate: Long position holders pay short position holders.
funding1h.title: Est. Funding (1h)

interestPayment.description: Interest payments are made on average every 15 minutes.
interestPayment.formula: The payment is calculated as: (interest rate at time of payment) x (value of the balance). The value is determined using the oracle price.
interestPayment.positive: Deposit/Positive balance = you are paid interest
interestPayment.title: Interest Payment
interestPayment.underlyingAsset: Payments are made in the underlying asset. If you do not have it, the protocol will automatically borrow it.

liquidationType.epilogue: The latter only happens if you have a perp position and a spot balance position of the perp’s underlying asset.
liquidationType.prologue: Liquidation events happen one by one, with the riskiest positions being liquidated first.
liquidationType.title: Type of Liquidation

marginManagerBalancesMarginCalc.legend: To determine the collateral value or margin required for a balance:
marginManagerBalancesMarginCalc.negativeBalance: Negative balance (borrow): short weight x value of net balance
marginManagerBalancesMarginCalc.positiveBalance: Positive balance (deposit): long weight x value of net balance
marginManagerBalancesMarginCalc.title: Balances Margin Impact
marginManagerBalancesMarginCalc.valueDeterminedUsingOraclePrice: Value is determined using oracle price.

marginManagerPerpCrossMarginCalc.amountAbsoluteSizeOfPosition: Here, |amount| is the absolute size of the position.
marginManagerPerpCrossMarginCalc.legend: The margin shown reflects the impact of the cross position on your account without the effects of unsettled PnL:
marginManagerPerpCrossMarginCalc.title: Perp Cross Margin

marginManagerPerpPortionOfSpread.part1: This is the portion of the spread that comes from a perp position.
marginManagerPerpPortionOfSpread.part2: If you are short -10 ETH but only 5 of it contributes to the spread, then only -5 ETH will be displayed here, since that is what you are awarded a discount on.
marginManagerPerpPortionOfSpread.title: Perp Portion of Spread

marginManagerPerpPositionsUnsettled.description: Unsettled is the portion of open Perp PnL yet to be settled into the underlying {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}} balance. Perp positions are periodically “settled” between traders, transferring {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}} between winning and losing positions.
marginManagerPerpPositionsUnsettled.negative: <highlight>Negative</highlight> = once settled, this amount of {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}} will be subtracted from your balance.
marginManagerPerpPositionsUnsettled.positive: <highlight>Positive</highlight> = once settled, this amount of {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}} will be added to your balance.
marginManagerPerpPositionsUnsettled.title: Unsettled

marginManagerSizeOfSpread.part1: This is the amount of exposure/risk offset between spot and perp.
marginManagerSizeOfSpread.part2: For example: if you have 10 ETH spot and -5 ETH perp, the Spread Size is the 5 ETH offset between the two.
marginManagerSizeOfSpread.title: Spread Size

marginManagerSpotPortionOfSpread.part1: This is the portion of the spread that comes from a spot position (deposit or borrow).
marginManagerSpotPortionOfSpread.part2: If you are holding 10 ETH but only 5 of it contributes to the spread, then only 5 will be displayed here, since that is what you are awarded a discount on.
marginManagerSpotPortionOfSpread.title: Spot Portion of Spread

marginManagerSpreadMarginCalc.description: The protocol gives a margin benefit for accounts with spot and perp positions that offset one another.
marginManagerSpreadMarginCalc.learnMore: To learn how this is calculated, refer to <link>Spread Docs</link>.
marginManagerSpreadMarginCalc.title: Spread Benefit

marginUsageInitial.part1: Margin Usage represents the percentage of your account value that is locked as initial margin for your cross perpetual positions and borrows.
marginUsageInitial.part2: At a margin usage of 100%, you will not be able to initiate new positions and must add collateral or reduce risk to continue trading.
marginUsageInitial.part3: Please note – 100% does not mean liquidation. It only means your initial margin is fully utilized.
marginUsageInitial.title: Margin Usage (Initial)

perpPositionsEstimatedLiqPrice.description: The estimated price at which this position (on its own) would make you eligible for liquidation.
perpPositionsEstimatedLiqPrice.multiplePositionsNotice: Please note – this estimate assumes only this market moves. If you have multiple positions or borrows, your actual liquidation risk is portfolio-based and may differ from this estimate.
perpPositionsEstimatedLiqPrice.title: Est. Liq. Price

perpPositionsMargin.cross: <highlight>Cross positions:</highlight> The initial cross account margin required to maintain the position.
perpPositionsMargin.isolated: <highlight>Isolated positions:</highlight> The current margin for the position, including unrealized PnL.
perpPositionsMargin.title: Margin

perpPositionsTpSl.ioc: TP/SL orders are Immediate-Or-Cancel (IOC), which means that any portion of the order that cannot be immediately filled will be cancelled.
perpPositionsTpSl.oneClickTradingRequired: 1-Click Trading (1CT) must be enabled to use TP/SL.
perpPositionsTpSl.reduceOnly: TP/SL orders are reduce-only, which means that they can only reduce or close an existing position.
perpPositionsTpSl.title: Take Profit & Stop Loss

realizedPnl.part1: The realized gain or loss resulting from the order fill. Fees and funding are not included.
realizedPnl.part2: If your reduce position order filled across multiple trades, then your realized PnL for the entire position is the sum of trades for that position.
realizedPnl.title: Realized PnL

repayConvertMaxRepay.part1: The maximum amount you can repay via a market convert order.
repayConvertMaxRepay.part2: If your margin usage is high, you may not be able to repay your full borrow even with sufficient deposited assets.
repayConvertMaxRepay.part3: In these cases, deposit additional collateral first, then repay.
repayConvertMaxRepay.title: Max Repay

settlement.description: Perp PnL is periodically settled between traders, transferring {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}} between winning and losing positions. Settlements include any gains or losses from funding payments.
settlement.negative: <highlight>(-)</highlight> = the position had negative PnL and you paid {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}}
settlement.positive: <highlight>(+)</highlight> = the position had positive PnL and you were paid {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}}
settlement.title: Settlement

tradingTimeInForce.fok: FOK: The order will be cancelled if not entirely filled. No partial fills are allowed.
tradingTimeInForce.goodUntil: Good Until: The order will remain open until it is filled, cancelled, or expires based on the time set below.
tradingTimeInForce.gtc: GTC: The order will remain open until it is filled or cancelled.
tradingTimeInForce.ioc: IOC: The order will be immediately executed and any unfilled portion will be cancelled.
tradingTimeInForce.title: Time in Force

tradingTwapRandomOrder.description: When enabled, each sub-order generated by the TWAP algorithm will have a randomized size within ±{{randomnessFraction}} of the calculated average. Due to rounding requirements, the total size across all sub-orders may differ slightly from the user-specified total.
tradingTwapRandomOrder.title: Random Order

depositAPY.content: The current estimated APY you earn for depositing/holding this asset. Interest on positive balances is accrued continuously and paid automatically, with payments processed roughly every 15 minutes.
depositAPY.title: Deposit APY

enableBorrowsSwitch.content: Enables you to borrow assets against your existing collateral. Borrowing increases your margin usage and account risk.
enableBorrowsSwitch.title: Borrows (on/off)

estimatedPositionPnL.content: Estimated unrealized PnL based on average entry price and estimated exit price (best bid for longs, best ask for shorts). This value excludes funding, fees, and potential slippage.
estimatedPositionPnL.title: Estimated PnL

fastWithdrawalFee.content: The fee deducted from the withdrawal amount when using Fast Withdraw. This fee helps cover the costs of the instant withdrawal service and prevents abuse.
fastWithdrawalFee.title: Fast Withdrawal Fee

fuulReferralsTotalReferredVolume.content: Total trading volume generated by your referred users.
fuulReferralsTotalReferredVolume.title: Total Volume

gasFee.content: The fee is used by our sequencer to submit transactions on-chain.
gasFee.title: Gas Fee

historicalLiquidationAffectedPositions.content: The size and value of the position(s) affected by the liquidation. Values are calculated using the oracle price.
historicalLiquidationAffectedPositions.title: Liquidation

historicalLiquidationOraclePrice.content: The price of the position at the time of liquidation. The liquidation price occurs at a discount to the oracle price. For the exact mechanics and calculation, please consult the documentation.
historicalLiquidationOraclePrice.title: Oracle Price

historicalLiquidationPositionChanges.content: The associated changes in position size from the liquidation.
historicalLiquidationPositionChanges.title: Position Changes

historicalNlpChangeInBalances.content: The change in asset balances for this transaction. The transaction fee is included in the amounts shown.
historicalNlpChangeInBalances.title: Change in Balances

historicalWithdrawalsProcessing.content: Withdrawals may be delayed due to high on-chain gas costs. If Fast Withdraw is available for this asset, you can execute processing withdrawals instantly.
historicalWithdrawalsProcessing.title: Processing Withdrawals

isolatedPerpPositionsMargin.content: The margin currently deposited for the position.
isolatedPerpPositionsMargin.title: Margin

lastPrice.content: The last trade price of the market.
lastPrice.title: Last Price

maintMarginRatio.content: The amount of maintenance margin your account has and the percentage of your total that is being used (ratio). Your account becomes eligible for liquidation when the maintenance margin ratio reaches 100%. Maintenance margin is the amount of margin you must maintain in an account to avoid liquidation.
maintMarginRatio.title: Maintenance Margin & Ratio

marginManagerPerpIsolatedMarginCalc.content: The margin currently allocated to this isolated position. If the position's maintenance margin falls below zero, it becomes eligible for liquidation.
marginManagerPerpIsolatedMarginCalc.title: Perp Isolated Margin

marginManagerQuoteMarginCalc.content: {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}} collateral and borrow value is weighted 1:1 with market value (oracle).
marginManagerQuoteMarginCalc.title: {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}} Collateral/Margin

marginManagerQuoteNetBalance.content: This is the sum of your cash balance and unsettled balance.
marginManagerQuoteNetBalance.title: Net {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}} Balance

marginManagerSpotAssetBalance.content: The balance of the asset. A positive balance indicates a deposit and a negative balance indicates a borrow.
marginManagerSpotAssetBalance.title: Asset Balance

marginManagerSpotBalanceValue.content: This is the market value of the balance using the oracle price.
marginManagerSpotBalanceValue.title: Balance Value

marginManagerSpotQuoteBalance.content: This is the amount of {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}} you have deposited or are borrowing. The balance is negative if you are borrowing.
marginManagerSpotQuoteBalance.title: {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}} Cash Balance

marginManagerUnsettledQuoteBalance.content: If you have open perp positions, this is the portion of your PnL that hasn't been settled. Settlements are made automatically between losing and winning positions.
marginManagerUnsettledQuoteBalance.title: Unsettled {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}} Balance

maxAmount.content: Your balance of the asset minus what's being held in open orders or required as margin.
maxAmount.title: Max amount

maxWithBorrow.content: The combination of your available balance and what you can borrow against your margin. Borrowing is done automatically.
maxWithBorrow.title: Max with borrow

nlpLockedBalance.content: Funds deposited into the NLP have a 4-day lock-up period.
nlpLockedBalance.title: Locked Balance

nlpLockupPeriod.content: The period of time during which your NLP is locked up. During this period, you cannot withdraw your NLP.
nlpLockupPeriod.title: Lock-up period

nlpMaxDeposit.content: Each wallet can deposit up to $20k by default
nlpMaxDeposit.title: Max Deposit

nlpMaxDrawdown.content: Maximum Drawdown is the largest loss from a peak value to a subsequent trough within the chosen period.
nlpMaxDrawdown.title: Maximum Drawdown

octRemainingActivations.content: You can enable 1-Click Trading up to 50 times per week. After exceeding this quota, you can disable 1CT but cannot re-enable it until the quota resets at the start of the following week.
octRemainingActivations.title: Weekly activations remaining

octRememberApproval.content: When enabled, you will not be required to approve 1-Click Trading again unless you clear your browser cache. Your 1-Click Trading key will be saved to your browser's storage and will not persist across devices. Do not enable this feature on shared or public devices.
octRememberApproval.title: Remember Approval

octSignEveryTransaction.content: Without 1-Click Trading, you will need to manually sign every transaction with your wallet. Additionally, advanced orders (Stop Market, Stop Limit, TP/SL, TWAP) cannot be placed.
octSignEveryTransaction.title: Sign Every Transaction

openEngineOrdersLimitPrice.content: The price at which the limit order will be executed.
openEngineOrdersLimitPrice.title: Price

oraclePrice.content: The external reference price used to value positions and collateral. It is derived from the underlying asset’s price across major exchanges.
oraclePrice.title: Oracle Price

overview30dVolume.content: The total volume you have traded across perps and spot for the last 30 days. This is used to determine your fee tier.
overview30dVolume.title: 30d Trade Volume

overviewAccountCumulativePnl.content: Your account-wide PnL, including spot trades and perp positions.
overviewAccountCumulativePnl.title: Account PnL

overviewAccountSpotBalance.content: The sum of your account's spot balances.
overviewAccountSpotBalance.title: Account Balance

overviewCrossUnrealizedPnl.content: The sum of your open cross positions' PnL based on the estimated exit price.
overviewCrossUnrealizedPnl.title: Cross Unrealized PnL

overviewIsoUnrealizedPnl.content: The sum of your open isolated positions' PnL based on the estimated exit price.
overviewIsoUnrealizedPnl.title: Iso. Unrealized PnL

overviewNlpBalance.content: The balance of your NLP in the vault.
overviewNlpBalance.title: NLP Balance

overviewTimespanAccountPnl.content: Your account's gain or loss for the selected time frame.
overviewTimespanAccountPnl.title: Realized PnL

overviewTimespanPerpVolume.content: The total volume of perp trades for the selected time frame.
overviewTimespanPerpVolume.title: Perp Volume

overviewTimespanSpotVolume.content: The total volume of spot trades for the selected time frame.
overviewTimespanSpotVolume.title: Spot Volume

overviewTimespanVolume.content: The total volume of trades for the selected time frame.
overviewTimespanVolume.title: Volume

overviewTotalEquity.content: The total $ value of an account, using the oracle price. Account equity = assets - borrows +/- unsettled PnL.
overviewTotalEquity.title: Total Equity

overviewTotalUnrealizedPnl.content: The combined unrealized PnL from your spot holdings and open perp positions, calculated using the estimated exit price.
overviewTotalUnrealizedPnl.title: Unrealized PnL

perpOpenInterest.content: The total outstanding in perpetual contracts for this market, denominated in the quote {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}}.
perpOpenInterest.title: Open Interest

perpPositionsFundingPayments.content: The total funding payments received (+) or paid (-). Payments are made hourly in {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}}. The funding rate for payments is calculated based on the difference between the market's TWAP orderbook price and the spot index price.
perpPositionsFundingPayments.title: Funding

perpUnderlyingSpotIndexPrice.content: The price of the underlying spot asset across other exchanges. It's used to calculate funding rates.
perpUnderlyingSpotIndexPrice.title: Index Price

repayAmountBorrowing.content: The current amount of the asset you are borrowing.
repayAmountBorrowing.title: Amount borrowing

repayConvertEstimatedPrice.content: This is the estimated conversion price. The actual price can vary depending on the state of the orderbook and slippage tolerance.
repayConvertEstimatedPrice.title: Estimated Price

repayDepositMaxDeposit.content: The total amount you have in your wallet to deposit and repay.
repayDepositMaxDeposit.title: Max Deposit

settingsChartOrderLines.content: Enable order lines on the price chart.
settingsChartOrderLines.title: Chart Order Lines

settingsChartPositionLines.content: Enable position lines on the price chart.
settingsChartPositionLines.title: Chart Position Lines

settingsDefaultMarginMode.content: The default margin mode used for markets you have not traded before.
settingsDefaultMarginMode.title: Default Margin Mode

settingsLowSlippageWarning.content: When slippage tolerance is set too low, orders may fail to execute because the actual execution price exceeds your maximum acceptable price difference. Consider increasing slippage tolerance if orders are frequently failing.
settingsLowSlippageWarning.title: Low Slippage

settingsOrderNotifications.content: Enable notifications for order placements, fills, and cancels.
settingsOrderNotifications.title: Order Notifications

settingsPositionMode.content: One-Way Mode allows you to hold only one position per market, either long or short.
settingsPositionMode.title: Position Mode

settingsQuickMarketClose.content: Selecting this option will automatically close 100% of the selected position when triggering a market close order.
settingsQuickMarketClose.title: Quick Market Close

settingsSlippageTolerance.content: Customize slippage tolerance per order type or reset to default by clicking the refresh icon.
settingsSlippageTolerance.title: Slippage Tolerance

spotLeverageSwitch.content: Spot Margin enables you to auto-borrow assets against your margin to trade with a larger size. Turn Margin ON to enable borrowing. Turn OFF to disable borrowing.
spotLeverageSwitch.title: Spot Margin

totalAccountBalance.content: The total combined balance of all accounts shown. This does not include accounts created via our API.
totalAccountBalance.title: Total Balance

tradingOrderbookOpenOrder.content: You have an order at this price level.
tradingOrderbookOpenOrder.title: Your order

tradingOrderTwapTotalSize.content: Total size distributed across all TWAP sub-orders. This value accounts for rounding and may differ slightly from the inputted size.
tradingOrderTwapTotalSize.title: Total Size

tradingOrderTypeLimit.content: A limit order executes only at your specified price or better. It remains open until fully filled, canceled, or expired.
tradingOrderTypeLimit.title: Limit Order

tradingOrderTypeMarket.content: A market order executes immediately at the best available market price. It is an Immediate or Cancel (IOC) order, meaning any portion not filled instantly will be canceled.
tradingOrderTypeMarket.title: Market Order

tradingOrderTypeScaledOrder.content: A Scaled order automatically places multiple limit orders at different price levels within a specified range. This allows you to gradually build or reduce positions across a price range, capturing better average execution prices.
tradingOrderTypeScaledOrder.title: Scaled Order

tradingOrderTypeStopLimit.content: A stop limit order becomes a limit order when the stop (trigger) price is reached. It will only execute at your specified limit price or better.
tradingOrderTypeStopLimit.title: Stop Limit Order

tradingOrderTypeStopMarket.content: A stop market order becomes a market order once the stop (trigger) price is reached. As a market order, it is treated as an Immediate or Cancel (IOC) order — it will attempt to fill immediately, and any unfilled portion will be canceled.
tradingOrderTypeStopMarket.title: Stop Market Order

tradingOrderTypeTwap.content: A TWAP (Time Weighted Average Price) order incrementally executes over a specified time period. It breaks the order into smaller parts to minimize market impact and achieve an average price over time.
tradingOrderTypeTwap.title: TWAP Order

tradingPostOnly.content: The order will only be placed if it can be added as a maker order and not as a taker order.
tradingPostOnly.title: Post Only

tradingReduceOnly.content: The order will only reduce position, any remaining unfilled portion resulting in position increase will get cancelled.
tradingReduceOnly.title: Reduce Only

delayedWithdrawalExplanation: Withdrawals may be delayed due to high on-chain gas costs. If <highlight>Fast Withdraw</highlight> is available for this asset, you can execute processing withdrawals instantly on the History page.
depositFundsFromConnectedWallet: Deposit funds from your connected wallet
directDepositConfirmation: I will only send <underline>{{productSymbol}}</underline> on <underline>{{chainName}}</underline> to this address. Unsupported assets or transfers from other chains will be lost.
directDepositReceiveWarning: Note: Only assets on {{chainName}} are accepted. Sending unsupported assets or funds from other chains will be lost.
editOrderViaChartDescription: You can modify orders by dragging order lines on the chart. This results in the cancellation of the original order and placement of a new one. The order modification may fail if the price of the new order is invalid.

emptyPlaceholders.fundingPayments: Your funding payments will appear here.
emptyPlaceholders.historicalTriggerOrders: Your historical trigger orders will appear here.
emptyPlaceholders.interestPayments: Your interest payments will appear here.
emptyPlaceholders.nlpOpenOrders: NLP open orders will appear here.
emptyPlaceholders.noSearchResultsFound: No search results found. Please ensure that you have typed the search term correctly.
emptyPlaceholders.openLimitOrders: Your open limit orders will appear here.
emptyPlaceholders.openOrders: Your open orders will appear here.
emptyPlaceholders.orderHistory: Your order history will appear here.
emptyPlaceholders.perpPositions: Your perp positions will appear here.
emptyPlaceholders.perpSettlements: Your perp settlements will appear here.
emptyPlaceholders.pointsHistory: Your points history will appear here.
emptyPlaceholders.referredTraders: Your referred traders will appear here.

errors.addMaxExceeded: Insufficient balance available. Please reduce the entered amount.
errors.belowMinAmount: Minimum amount is {{formattedMinValue}}. Please increase your amount.
errors.cannotClosePositionNoPrice: Cannot close position, no price available
errors.cannotTransferToSameAccount: You cannot transfer to the same account.
errors.deleteReferralActiveAccount: Cannot delete referral. Referee has an active account
errors.insufficientBalanceForOneClickTradingFee: Insufficient {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}} balance. Please ensure that you have {{feeAmount}} {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}} in your wallet to pay the transaction fee.

insufficientLiquidity.description: There is not enough liquidity available for fast withdraw.
insufficientLiquidity.title: Insufficient Liquidity

errors.invalidAmountInput: Unable to recognize amount. Please enter a number, optionally with a decimal point (e.g. 0.01).
errors.invalidPriceIncrement: Price must be a multiple of {{priceIncrement}}
errors.invalidPriceInput: Unable to recognize price. Please enter a number, optionally with a decimal point (e.g. 0.01).
errors.invalidPrivateKeyFormat: Private key format is invalid. Please check it starts with "0x" and try again.
errors.invalidSizeIncrement: Order size must be a multiple of {{sizeIncrement}}. Please adjust your order size.
errors.invalidSlippageInput: Unable to recognize slippage tolerance. Please enter a number, optionally with a decimal point (e.g. 0.01).
errors.invalidTriggerPriceInput: Unable to recognize {{orderTypeLabel}} price. Please enter a number, optionally with a decimal point (e.g. 0.01).
errors.leverageInvalidIncrement: Leverage must be in increments of {{leverageIncrement}}x.
errors.maxExceeded: Amount exceeds your available amount. Please reduce the entered amount.
errors.maxExceededClosePosition: Amount is greater than size of the position. Please decrease your order size.
errors.maxOrderSizeExceeded: Amount cannot exceed your position size of {{maxOrderSize}}. Please adjust your order size.
errors.mustBeMultipleOfIncrement: Value must be a multiple of {{increment}}
errors.nlpPoolAtCapacityError: The NLP pool is currently at capacity and is not accepting new deposits.
errors.notBorrowingThisAsset: You are not borrowing this asset.
errors.oneClickTradingRememberApprovalOff: 1-Click Trading Remember Approval is turned off.
errors.orderFailed_one: Order has failed to place. Please see the error details for more information.
errors.orderFailed_other: {{count}} orders have failed to place. Please see the error details for more information.
errors.pageDoesNotExist: The page you are looking for does not exist.
errors.pleaseEnterNumberBetweenMinAndMax: Please enter a number between {{min}} and {{max}}.
errors.pleaseEnterValidEndPrice: Please enter a valid end price.
errors.pleaseEnterValidStartPrice: Please enter a valid start price.
errors.positionLimitExceeded: Position limit exceeded. Cancel open orders or deposit more collateral.
errors.removeMaxExceeded: Amount exceeds your available withdrawable margin. Please reduce the entered amount.
errors.repayConvertMaxExceeded: Amount exceeds maximum convert order size. Please reduce the entered amount.
errors.suborderSizeBelowMin: Amount per suborder must be greater than minimum order size of {{minOrderSize}}. Please increase your order size.
errors.timeInForceInDaysInvalidInput: Unable to recognize Time in Force. Please enter a number between 1 and 365.
errors.timeInForceInDaysOutOfRange: Time in force must be between 1 and 365 days.
errors.triggerPriceMustBeAbovePrice: Trigger price must be above price
errors.triggerPriceMustBeBelowPrice: Trigger price must be below price
errors.twapDurationHoursInvalidInput: Please enter a number between 0 and 24.
errors.twapDurationMinutesInvalidInput: Please enter a number between 0 and 59.
errors.usernamesMustBeLessThan24Characters: Usernames must be less than 24 characters and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores.

withdrawalAlreadyCompleted.description: This withdrawal has already been completed.
withdrawalAlreadyCompleted.title: Withdrawal Completed

withdrawalBelowMinimum.description: The withdrawal amount has to be larger than the fee.
withdrawalBelowMinimum.title: Below Minimum

errors.withdrawAmountBelowMinFee: Amount must be greater than the withdrawal fee. Please increase the entered amount.
errors.withdrawAmountExceedsBorrowable: Amount exceeds maximum borrowable. Please enter a lower amount.
errors.withdrawAmountExceedsWithdrawableSuggest: Amount exceeds your maximum withdrawable balance. Consider borrowing instead.

fastWithdrawals.liquidityConstraint: If there isn't enough liquidity for fast withdraw pool, your withdrawal will be processed as usual and you will not be charged the fee.
fastWithdrawals.skipQueue: Skip the queue and receive your assets immediately.

generateDesktopWalletLinkQRCodeDialog.approve1CTAndEnsureRememberApproval: <action>Approve 1CT</action> and ensure <highlight>Remember Approval</highlight> is turned on.
generateDesktopWalletLinkQRCodeDialog.enable1CTAndEnsureRememberApproval: <action>Enable 1CT</action> and ensure <highlight>Remember Approval</highlight> is turned on.

generatePrivateKeyInstruction: Generate a private key, or paste one that you have generated previously. <highlight>Save the key in a secure place</highlight>.
getStartedDescription: Learn how to get set up on {{primaryChainName}} and deposit assets to start trading.

imageAltText.mobileAppLinkQrCode: Nado Mobile App Link QR Code

lastChangeAllowedForThisWeek: Last change allowed for this week

leverageAdjustmentNotice.crossEffect: Cross margin leverage scales your max size per-order. It has no effect on margin consumed by your position.
leverageAdjustmentNotice.crossRisk: Higher leverage increases maintenance margin usage. Use the <highlight>Margin Manager</highlight> in the Portfolio page to monitor risk.
leverageAdjustmentNotice.isolated: Leverage adjustment has no effect on the margin consumed by your existing position.

limitAndTpSlOrdersWillBeCancelled: Limit & TP/SL orders will be cancelled

linkedSignerLocalStorage.customSignerDescription: Set a custom local linked signer. Useful if you have configured a linked signer via API and want to use it via the UI.
linkedSignerLocalStorage.turnOffDescription: Manually sign all transactions for this session.

maintMarginUsageReachedFraction: Your maintenance margin usage has reached {{usageFraction}}. Your account will become eligible for liquidation at 100%.
manageRiskSlippageLimitOrders: Manage your risk by adjusting slippage tolerance or using limit orders.

manualLinkSigner.description: Manually execute a LinkSigner transaction for the currently connected wallet.

marginIsolatedToPosition: Margin is isolated to one position.
marketStatusLiveDescription: Market is open for trading. The market will enter reduce-only mode at {{reduceOnlyTime}}.
marketStatusReduceOnlyDescription: Market is in reduce-only mode. You can close or reduce existing positions, but creating or increasing positions is not available until the market reopens at {{reopenTime}}.
maxRepayWarningDescription: This trade might execute at a better price than the one quoted, which could mean you receive a bit more of the asset you're repaying, resulting in a small positive balance.
name: Name
navigateToAppLinkWithYourMobileDevice: Navigate to <highlight>{{appLink}}</highlight> with your mobile device and tap the <highlight>Desktop Wallet Link</highlight> in the Connect dialog. Or scan the QR code below:
nlpInBalancesContributesToMargin: NLP will appear in your balances and contribute to margin while earning from the vault APR. Each wallet can deposit up to $20k by default.
noBorrowsAtTheMoment: You have no borrows at the moment.

bridgeInitiated.description: Your USDC transfer is being processed. It may take a few minutes to appear in the explorer.
bridgeInitiated.title: Deposit Initiated

notifications.cancelMultiOrdersSuccess_one: You have successfully cancelled the order.

cancelOrderSuccess.remainingOrderCancelled: The remaining portion of your {{marketName}} order was cancelled.
cancelOrderSuccess.title: {{orderType}} Order Cancelled

marginUsageWarning.body: Your initial margin usage has reached 100%. Please deposit more collateral or close positions to continue trading.

newPerpMarkets.content_one: GM! We've added <highlight>one new perp market</highlight>
newPerpMarkets.content_other: GM! We've added <highlight>{{count}} new perp markets</highlight>

newSpotMarket.description: GM! You can now Deposit and use {{symbol}} as collateral. You can also trade {{marketName}}.
newSpotMarket.title: New Collateral & Spot Market

pendingDelists.description_one: The following market will be delisted at <highlight>{{delistTime}}</highlight>. Please manage your positions.
pendingDelists.description_other: The following markets will be delisted at <highlight>{{delistTime}}</highlight>. Please manage your positions.

notifications.smartContractWalletRequirement: Smart contract wallets require 1-Click Trading to interact with the app. Please enable 1CT now.
notifications.spotAndPerpLiquidated: Your spot balance and perp position were liquidated.

usdt0BridgeSuccess.description: Your USDT deposit transaction has been submitted. Track the cross-chain delivery on LayerZero Scan.
usdt0BridgeSuccess.title: Deposit Initiated

obtainTestnetFundsWithLimits: Obtain testnet funds. 10 tokens per request. (95 for {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}})
onChainActionsNotAvailableNote: Note: On-chain actions such as <highlight>deposits</highlight> are not available through this login method.
oneClickTradingBenefits: 1-Click Trading gives you a faster trading experience and lets you use advanced order types like TP/SL.
oneClickTradingEnabledDelayWarning: You may now close this dialog. It may take a minute for 1CT to be enabled.
oneClickTradingFeeDescription: Enabling 1CT with a new key requires a 1-time fee of <highlight>{{feeAmount}} {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}}</highlight>. The fee is deducted from your wallet, not your Nado account.
oneClickTradingLimitReached: You have already enabled 1-Click Trading 50 times in the past week, which is the maximum number allowed. Please come back next week to enable 1CT.
oneClickTradingLimitWarning: You can only enable 1-Click Trading 50 times/week. If you change to Sign Every Transaction right now, you won't be able to enable 1CT again until next week.
oneClickTradingRequiredForAdvancedOrders: 1-Click Trading is required to use advanced orders.
oneClickTradingRequiredForLinkedDesktopW: You cannot disable 1-Click Trading. 1CT is required for linked desktop wallets.
onlySymbolCanBeUsedAsMargin: Only {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}} can be used as margin.

cancelledDetails.accountHealthExceeded: The order would have exceeded account health requirements
cancelledDetails.isolatedSubaccountClosed: The isolated subaccount for the order was closed
cancelledDetails.manuallyCancelled: You have manually cancelled the order
cancelledDetails.signerChanged: 1CT has been reset after the order was placed

perpMarginModeCrossInfo.adjustLeverageScale: Adjust leverage to scale your max order size for the current order.
perpMarginModeCrossInfo.leverageAdjustmentNoEffect: Leverage adjustment has no effect on the margin consumed by your existing position.
perpMarginModeCrossInfo.sharedMargin: Margin is shared across positions & balances.

perpMarginModeIsolatedOnlyDisclosure.description: This market only supports isolated margin mode. Cross margin trading is not available.
perpMarginModeIsolatedOnlyDisclosure.title: Isolated Margin Only

perpPnlSocialSharingDialog.xPostText: Trade {{symbol}} on Nado with unified margin. {{baseUrl}}

pointsTierShareDialog.shareTierXPostText:
Just hit {{tierName}} Tier on @nadoHQ! 🌪
Ranked #{{lastWeekRank}} last week | #{{allTimeRank}} all-time

preLiquidationBalancesIfAskedBySupport: If asked by support, copy and share the JSON snapshot.
preLiquidationBalancesSnapshotNotice: The following is a snapshot of your account before the liquidation event at {{liquidationTime}}.
qrCodeLoginDescription: The QR code allows you to log in to your account from a mobile device.
qrCodeTrustWarning: Only scan the QR code with devices you trust.
queryOnlyTerritoriesDescription: Users from the following Restricted Territories can view but not use the platform:

referrals.cannotDeleteRefereeWithTradingVolume: Cannot delete referee with trading volume
referrals.pageDescription: You're part of Nado's first wave. Trade to unlock 1 invite for every $250k in volume, up to 100 in total.

reportBugsDescription: Submit bug reports to earn bounties
restrictedTerritoryNotice: It appears that you are accessing from a Restricted Territory. At this time, we are not able to support users at your location.
revealInstructions: Once you have the Desktop Wallet Link dialog open, click the button below to reveal the login QR code.
sanctionedTerritoriesDescription: It appears that you are accessing from a Restricted Territory. We are not able to support users from the following Restricted Territories at this time:
scanQrCodeToLogin: Scan the QR code on your desktop to log in.

seo.description: Nado DEX: Orderbook on Ink L2 fusing CEX speed (5-15ms latency) & DeFi security. Trade spot & perps via a unified cross-margin system with deep liquidity and self-custody of funds. Built by the team that brought you Kraken; harness the perfect storm.
seo.title: Nado DEX: Unified Perps & Spot on Ink L2

settlementModeNotice: At {{reduceOnlyTime}}, {{marketName}} will enter settlement mode and you will only be allowed to close your position.

sharingFlow.step1: X will open, and the image will be copied automatically
sharingFlow.step2: Paste the image into your post (ctrl+v or ⌘+v)

smartContractWalletNotice: It looks like you're using a smart contract wallet.
smartContractWalletQuestion: Using Safe or a smart contract wallet? <action>Click Here</action>
smartContractWalletRequirement: Smart contract wallets, such as Safe, require 1-Click Trading to interact with the app.
smartContractWalletWarning: It looks like you're using a smart contract wallet. Please <action>enable 1-Click Trading</action> after depositing to use the app. Ensure that you leave at least <highlight>{{SEQUENCER_FEE_AMOUNT_USDT}} {{primaryQuoteTokenSymbol}}</highlight> in your wallet to pay the setup fee.
spotLeverageDisclaimerText: Spot Margin lets you automatically borrow assets against your margin to buy or sell more than you currently hold. Borrowing increases risk.
spotLeverageOffDisclaimerText: Turning Spot Margin OFF will not cancel existing open orders.

termsOfUseDialog.agreementText: By clicking this button, you agree to our <termsofuselink>Terms of Use</termsofuselink> and <privacypolicylink>Privacy Policy</privacypolicylink>.

content.lawfulAccess: You are lawfully permitted to access and use this website, any services provided by Nado, and otherwise trade on Nado under the laws of any jurisdiction applicable to you.
content.noCurrentAccess: You are not accessing or using this website, any services provided by Nado, or otherwise trading on Nado from a Restricted Territory.
content.noFutureAccess: You will not in the future access or use this website, any services provided by Nado, or otherwise trade on Nado while located in a Restricted Territory.
content.noVpn: You are not using, and will not in the future use, a VPN or any other privacy or anonymization tools or techniques to circumvent, or attempt to circumvent, the above restrictions.
content.restrictedPerson: You are not a person or entity who is a resident of or is located or incorporated in or has a registered office in a Restricted Territory (as such term is defined in the Terms of Use).
content.risksAcknowledgment: You have read Section 11 of the Terms of Use and understand the risks associated with trading in digital assets and the specific risks associated with trading perpetual contracts and investing with borrowed funds.

termsOfUseDialog.warrantSubtitle: You hereby agree and warrant that:

termsReference: Please refer to our <termsofuselink>Terms of Use</termsofuselink> for additional information.

tooltips.twapOrdersNotAvailableForIsolated: TWAP orders are not available for isolated margin
tooltips.twapOrdersRequireSpotMargin: TWAP orders require Spot Margin to be enabled

tradingCeaseNotice: Trading will fully cease at {{delistTime}} and positions will be force closed.

tradingChart.backfillMarkTooltip: Candlesticks before this time are backfilled with external data

tooltips.crossLiquidationPriceDesc: Cross margin liquidation prices are less accurate as they depend on overall account equity.
tooltips.isoLiquidationPriceDesc: Iso margin liquidation price is position-specific but may change as partial liquidations occur.

deposit.description: Deposit various collaterals to trade with. You can deposit from 15+ other chains, or <action>manually bridge to Ink</action>.

enable1ct.description: Trade faster and unlock advanced orders with 1-Click Trading.

getStartedOnChain.description: Nado is deployed on {{chainName}}. Switch to {{chainName}} with the button below or follow the manual <action>setup guide</action>.

setTradingPreferences.description: Decide if you want to trade on the right or left. Adjust your market slippage tolerance.

useSameKeyToSetUpOneClickTradingOnOtherD: Use the same key to set up 1CT on other devices. No fee will apply when the same key is used.

aboutTab.betaCapNotice: During Beta, deposit caps are dynamically allocated based on Trading Tier and NFT status. The default maximum per wallet is $20,000, subject to available capacity.
aboutTab.protocolDescription: {{tokenSymbol}} is a vault-based protocol embedded in the Nado orderbook that channels deposits into better platform liquidity across diversified perpetuals strategies, capturing yields from liquidations and market-making.

withdrawalsSubmittedOnChainOnceGasThresh: Withdrawals will be submitted on-chain once the gas threshold is reached.
